data.title: 1844 Resources Inc. Announces Director Resignation
data.description:
1844 Resources Inc ( (TSE:EFF) ) has shared an update.

1844 Resources Inc. announced the resignation of Mr. Tom MacNeill from his role as a Director, effective immediately. Mr. MacNeill, a founding Director, has been acknowledged for his contributions and will continue to support the company’s flagship Vortex project. This change in leadership may impact the company’s strategic direction and stakeholder relations, as the company continues to focus on its exploration activities in Gaspé, Québec.

More about 1844 Resources Inc

1844 Resources Inc. is an exploration company focused on strategic and energetic metals in underexplored regions, particularly in Gaspé, Québec. The company aims to create shareholder value through the discovery of new deposits, driven by a dedicated management team.

Average Trading Volume: 259,042

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$2.21M

data.title: Xplora Technologies to Present Q3 2025 Results and Future Growth Plans
data.description:
The latest update is out from Xplora Technologies AS ( (DE:86P) ).

Xplora Technologies AS announced a presentation of its Q3 2025 financial results and a Capital Markets Update, highlighting its strategic focus on expanding into the Senior market and broadening its youth offerings. The company aims to continue its growth trajectory and innovation in smartwatches for kids and phones for seniors, with a goal of reaching one million subscriptions, reflecting its commitment to leading the family-centric technology market.

More about Xplora Technologies AS

Xplora Technologies AS is a Norwegian company specializing in technology solutions that keep families connected and safe. The company is known for designing smart devices and services targeting Kids, Youths, and Seniors, integrating secure communication with features that encourage physical activity and digital balance. Xplora pioneered the Kids’ smartwatch category in Europe and has expanded to include phones and solutions for Youth and Senior markets, establishing itself as a leading European platform for family-centric services.

Current Market Cap: NOK2.13B

data.title: OSR Holdings Acquires Woori IO for Strategic Expansion
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from OSR Holdings ( (OSRH) ).

On October 13, 2025, OSR Holdings Co., Ltd. (OSRK), a subsidiary of OSR Holdings Inc., entered into an agreement to acquire Woori IO Co., Ltd. (WORIO), a South Korean medical-device company specializing in non-invasive glucose monitoring technology. This acquisition, valued at approximately KRW 15 billion (USD 10.6 million), will make WORIO a wholly owned subsidiary of OSRK, with the transaction expected to close on January 12, 2026. WORIO’s innovative near-infrared spectroscopy platform for needle-free glucose monitoring aligns with OSRH’s strategy to enhance its medical-device platform and capture a share of the global glucose-monitoring market, projected to be worth over $40 billion by 2030. The acquisition is expected to strengthen OSRH’s industry positioning by integrating WORIO’s technology and leveraging its partnership with a major consumer electronics company for clinical development.

More about OSR Holdings

OSR Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSRH) is a global healthcare holding company focused on advancing biomedical innovation in health and wellness. Through its subsidiaries, the company engages in immuno-oncology, regenerative biologics, and medical device technologies, aiming to build a portfolio of breakthrough healthcare solutions to improve global health outcomes.

Average Trading Volume: 5,192,898

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $12.95M

For an in-depth examination of OSRH stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Power Metal Resources Completes Initial Investment in Blockchain-Enabled Minestarters
data.description:
Power Metal Resources Plc ( (GB:POW) ) has issued an announcement.

Power Metal Resources PLC has completed its initial 35% investment in Kingia FZCO, soon to be renamed Minestarters, a blockchain-enabled DeFi tokenisation platform. Minestarters aims to provide regulated access to mineral exploration investments through the growing RWA tokenisation market, offering automated benefit sharing and liquidity. This strategic move positions Power Metal to bridge the early-stage funding gap in the mining sector, potentially channeling significant investment into mining assets and offering investors exposure to traditionally inaccessible asset classes.

Spark’s Take on GB:POW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:POW is a Neutral.

Power Metal Resources Plc’s overall score reflects strong revenue growth and a solid balance sheet, partially offset by operational challenges and negative cash flows. The stock’s undervaluation provides an opportunity, while technical indicators suggest caution due to bearish trends.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:POW stock, click here.

More about Power Metal Resources Plc

Power Metal Resources PLC is a London-listed natural resources exploration company and project incubator. The company focuses on financing and managing global resource projects with a principal interest in large-scale metal discoveries across North America, Africa, Saudi Arabia, Oman, and Australia. Their portfolio includes a range of projects from early-stage exploration to advanced prospects undergoing drilling, with the aim of developing projects internally or through strategic joint ventures until they are ready for disposal or separate listing.

data.title: Mondi plc Launches €550 Million Eurobond to Strengthen Liquidity
data.description:
Mondi plc ( (GB:MNDI) ) just unveiled an update.

Mondi plc has launched a €550 million Eurobond, set to mature in May 2031 with a coupon of 3.375%. The proceeds will be used to refinance existing debt, including a tender offer on its €600 million notes due in April 2026, thereby strengthening the company’s liquidity position. The Eurobond, supported by European investors, will be traded on the London Stock Exchange and is part of Mondi’s Euro Medium Term Note programme, rated Baa1 by Moody’s and BBB+ by Standard and Poor’s.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:MNDI) stock is a Hold with a £10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mondi plc stock, see the GB:MNDI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:MNDI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:MNDI is a Neutral.

Mondi plc’s overall stock score is driven by mixed financial performance and bearish technical indicators. Positive corporate events and a strong dividend yield provide some support, but high valuation metrics and declining profitability are concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:MNDI stock, click here.

More about Mondi plc

Mondi is a global leader in packaging and paper, focusing on sustainable products. The company employs 24,000 people across more than 30 countries, offering a wide range of innovative solutions for consumer and industrial applications. Mondi emphasizes sustainability with ambitious goals for 2030, aiming for circular-driven solutions and climate action. In 2024, Mondi reported revenues of €7.4 billion and an underlying EBITDA of €1.0 billion. It is listed on the London Stock Exchange as a FTSE100 constituent and has a secondary listing on the JSE Limited.

data.title: Entra ASA Expands Green Bond Issue to NOK 500 Million
data.description:
Entra ASA ( (GB:0R3Y) ) has issued an announcement.

Entra ASA has re-opened its fixed rate green bond issue, ENTRA 76 ESG, adding NOK 200,000,000 at an issue price of 100.327%, bringing the total outstanding amount to NOK 500,000,000. This transaction, arranged by Nordea, reflects Entra’s commitment to sustainable financing and strengthens its position in the green bond market, potentially enhancing its appeal to environmentally-conscious investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0R3Y) stock is a Sell with a NOK102.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Entra ASA stock, see the GB:0R3Y Stock Forecast page.

More about Entra ASA

Entra ASA is a prominent owner, manager, and developer of office properties in Norway, with a portfolio of approximately 80 properties covering around 1.3 million square meters. These properties are primarily located in the Greater Oslo region, Bergen, and Stavanger. Entra’s tenant base mainly consists of public sector entities and high-quality private tenants with long-term leases. The company’s strategic focus is on profitable growth, being the preferred office provider, and leading in environmental sustainability.

data.title: Great Southern Bancorp Reports Strong Q3 2025 Earnings
data.description:
An update from Great Southern Bancorp ( (GSBC) ) is now available.

Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. reported preliminary third-quarter 2025 earnings of $1.56 per diluted common share, showing an increase from $1.41 in the same period last year. The company’s net interest income rose to $50.8 million, driven by lower interest expenses, while non-performing assets decreased significantly, reflecting strong asset quality. Despite economic pressures, the company maintained a solid capital position with a Tier 1 Leverage Ratio of 11.9% and continued to manage expenses carefully, focusing on long-term profitability and shareholder value.

data.title: Western Alliance Files Lawsuit Against Cantor Group
data.description:
An update from Western Alliance ( (WAL) ) is now available.

In August, Western Alliance Bank initiated a lawsuit against Cantor Group V, LLC, alleging fraud related to a revolving credit facility secured by commercial real estate loans. Despite these allegations, the bank believes the existing collateral is adequate to cover the obligations. The company maintains its financial outlook for 2025, noting that its criticized assets have decreased since June 30, 2025.
